title: Armor Abilities
body:
![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/426498453196111891/1115538597534244864/aa_banner_3.png)

![](https://img.shields.io/badge/AVAILABLE%20FOR%20VERsIONS-1.20%20%7C%201.19%20-e1c16e?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://tinyurl.com/ycxcajd6)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Ob5bG4G.png)

# 📖ABOUT📖
 

Armor Abilities adds new enchantments that perform unique abilities upon being activated by a keystroke. Unlike vanilla enchantments, active enchantments are manually activated by the player. These enchantments are associated with an armor slot, and each armor slot has its own unique keystroke and cooldown.

 

- 12 Total enchants, 3 for each armor piece

- HIGHLY recommended to use the Enchantment Descriptions mod

- Full config file support

- Leave any suggestions/comments/bugs on the github page

- Feel free to use in your modpacks

 
![](https://i.imgur.com/Ob5bG4G.png)


# 📕CONTENT📕
 

Indepth/technical descriptions are located on the Github

 

General 

- Default Keybinds are as follows

   - Helmet:       Z

   - Chestplate: X

   - Leggings:    R

   - Boots:         V 

   - Keybinds can be changed in settings

- Cooldowns are shown in the bottom left of the screen

   - Icons will blink faster as the cooldown runs out

- All enchantments are common rarity and are equally difficult to acquire as their levels increase

- Only one active enchantment can be placed on a given armor piece

Helmet Abilities

Focus - Instantly refresh all cooldowns excluding this one

- Cooldown: 50/45/40/35/30 seconds

 

Mind Control - Make nearby mobs target each other

- Cooldown: 28/26/24/22/20 seconds
- AOE: 6/7/8/9/10 blocks
- will only work on enemies with less than 40 max HP
- enemies can only be controlled once a minute

 

Telekinesis - Pull nearby enemies toward you

- Cooldown: 14/13/12/11/10 seconds
- AOE: 6/7/8/9/10 blocks

Chestplate Abilities

Explode - Transform into TNT and explode

- Cooldown: 19/18/17/16/15 seconds
- Fuse timer: 2 seconds
- Explosion strength: 2/2.5/3/3.5/4

 

Cleanse - Cleanse all status effects, flame, and frost

- Cooldown: 18/16/14/12/10 seconds

 

Siphon - Steal HP from nearby enemies

- Cooldown: 19/18/17/16/15 seconds
- AOE: 4/5/6/7/8 blocks
- Damage Dealt: 1 HP magic damage
- Base heal: 0/1/2/3/4 HP
- Heal per enemy: 1 HP
- Will not activate if no enemies are nearby

Legging Abilities 

Dash - Dash in the target direction

- Cooldown: 14/13/12/11/10 seconds
- Velocity: .9/1/1.1/1.2/1.3

 

Blink - Teleport a short distance forwards

- Cooldown: 14/13/12/11/10 seconds
- Distance: 3/4/5/6/7 blocks

 

Rush - Gain Speed and Strength for a duration

- Cooldown: 14/13/12/11/10
- Duration: 5 seconds
- Speed level: 1/2/2/3/3
- Strength level: 1/1/1/1/2

Boot Abilities

- All stomps will cause the player to jump if they are not already in the air

- All stomps will time out after 10 seconds of airtime

 

Anvil Stomp - Transform into an anvil, becoming immune to damage and launching nearby enemies into the air upon landing

- Cooldown: 14/13/12/11/10
- AOE: 7 blocks
- Enemy fall damage: 2/3/4/5/6 HP

 

Frost Stomp - Freeze and slow nearby enemies upon landing

- Cooldown: 14/13/12/11/10
- AOE: 7 blocks
- Slowness Level: 1/1/1/2/2
- Slowness Duration: 5 seconds
- Frozen duration: 5.5/7.5/9.5/11.5/13.5 seconds
- 1 HP frost damage every 2 seconds, the last 3.5 seconds will not inflict damage

 

Fire Stomp - Ignite and deal damage to nearby enemies upon landing

- Cooldown: 14/13/12/11/10 seconds
- AOE: 7 blocks
- Damage: 3/4/5/6/7 HP magic damage
- Fire duration: 1/2/3/4/5 seconds
- Spawns fire underneath affected enemies

![](https://i.imgur.com/Ob5bG4G.png)
